# PingWatch

PingWatch is an uptime monitoring SaaS that checks your websites every minute
and sends instant alerts when they go down.

## What it does
- Monitors website uptime 24/7
- Sends instant alerts via Telegram, Discord, Slack, or Email
- Tracks incident history and downtime duration
- Free plan available, no credit card required

## Who it's for
Developers, indie hackers, and small businesses who need to know
immediately when their website or API goes down.

## Pricing
- Free: basic monitoring
- Paid plans: more monitors and faster checks

## URL
https://pingwatch.netlify.app
